name: /pr-corpus-update --dry-run reports skipped=token-budget when estimated consumption exceeds remaining per L-7 cap enforcement
command: printf '%s' '{"stripe-node":{"used_today":99000,"date":"2026-05-25"}}' > b.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-corpus-update.sh" --source stripe-node --estimated-tokens 5000 --budget b.json --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'allowed=false' out.txt && grep -q 'skipped=token-budget' out.txt && echo capped 1>&2
